---
title: "Convergence overview"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: false
    toc_float: true
    code_folding: hide
params:
  gdx: "fulldata.gdx"
  warning: false
  message: false
  figWidth: 8
---

<style>
  #header {
    display: none !important
  }
  .main-container {
    max-width: 95% !important;
  }
  .toc-content {
    padding-left: 0px !important;
  }
  .svg-container {
    margin: auto !important;
  }
</style>


```{r loading_libraries, include=FALSE}

library(remind2)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  error = TRUE,
  fig.width = params$figWidth,
  message = params$message,
  warning = params$warning
)

```


## Convergence Criterias

```{r results = "asis", fig.height=10}

diag <- plotNashConvergence(gdx = params$gdx)
htmltools::tagList(diag$plot)

```

## Trade summary

```{r results = "asis", fig.height=10}

htmltools::tagList(diag$tradeDetailPlot)

```

## Non-convergence reasons per iteration

```{r results = "asis"}

# Per-iteration diagnostics come from the GAMS listing file full.lst, assumed to
# sit next to the gdx. toolParseLSTReasons() reads it only at render time, using
# grep/sed when available and falling back to pure R otherwise.
lstFile <- file.path(dirname(params$gdx), "full.lst")
reasons <- toolParseLSTReasons(lstFile)

if (is.null(reasons)) {
  cat(paste0("*No `full.lst` found next to the gdx (expected at `", lstFile,
             "`) - per-iteration diagnostics unavailable.*"))
} else if (nrow(reasons) == 0) {
  cat("*No per-iteration non-convergence sections found in `full.lst`.*")
} else {
  iters <- reasons$iteration
  texts <- reasons$text
  {
    n <- length(iters)
    divs <- paste0(
      "<div class='iterReasons' style='display:", ifelse(seq_len(n) == 1, "block", "none"),
      "'><pre style='white-space:pre-wrap'>", htmltools::htmlEscape(texts), "</pre></div>",
      collapse = "\n"
    )
    cat(paste0(
      "<input type='range' min='1' max='", n, "' value='1' id='iterReasonsSlider' style='width:100%'>\n",
      "<div id='iterReasonsLabel' style='font-weight:bold;margin:6px 0'></div>\n",
      "<div id='iterReasonsBox'>\n", divs, "\n</div>\n",
      "<script>\n(function(){\n",
      "var nums=[", paste(iters, collapse = ","), "];\n",
      "var slider=document.getElementById('iterReasonsSlider');\n",
      "var divs=document.getElementById('iterReasonsBox').getElementsByClassName('iterReasons');\n",
      "var label=document.getElementById('iterReasonsLabel');\n",
      "function show(i){for(var k=0;k<divs.length;k++){divs[k].style.display=(k==i-1)?'block':'none';}",
      "label.innerText='Iteration '+nums[i-1];}\n",
      "slider.addEventListener('input',function(e){show(+e.target.value);});\n",
      "show(1);\n})();\n</script>"
    ))
  }
}

```
